title: Company Node Standard
description: Company-specific extensions to CALM node definitions requiring cost center, ownership, and environment classification

costCenter.description: Company cost center code in the format CC-XXXX where XXXX are exactly 4 digits (e.g., CC-1234). Used for financial tracking and resource allocation.

owner.description: Team or individual responsible for the node. Should include contact information or team name for operational support and maintenance.

environment.description: Deployment environment classification. 'development' for active development, 'staging' for pre-production testing, 'production' for live customer-facing systems.
